title: American Revolution Crossword Challenge
description: Test your knowledge of key figures and terms from the American Revolution with this crossword puzzle. Learn about the important people and events that shaped the birth of the United States.
instructions: Read each clue carefully and fill in the correct answer in the corresponding numbered spaces. All answers relate to the American Revolution period (1763-1789).

words.clue: First President of the United States and Commander of the Continental Army
Document written primarily by Thomas Jefferson announcing independence from Britain
Town where the 'shot heard round the world' was fired
Diplomat, scientist, and Founding Father who helped negotiate the Treaty of Paris
Americans who remained faithful to the British Crown
Americans who supported independence from Great Britain
British policy that led to the slogan 'No ___ without representation'
Principal author of the Declaration of Independence
Nickname for British soldiers based on their uniforms
Final major battle of the Revolutionary War
Controversial 1765 act requiring tax payments on printed materials
The thirteen British territories that became the first U.S. states
